summary: Applied the Docker runtime baseline live on docker-runtime-lv3 and verified Docker Engine, Compose, and daemon configuration.

verification.observed: docker-runtime-lv3 reported Docker Engine 29.3.0 running after convergence.
docker compose was available with plugin version 5.1.1.
live-restore and bounded json-file log rotation were enabled on the guest.

notes: This receipt was backfilled from repository history and the current recorded platform state.
The apply included recovery from guest netplan MAC drift before the final successful converge.
